requirement_topic.en: RETIQ Mandatory Energy Efficiency Label — Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps (Colombia Star Rating)
requirement_topic.zh: RETIQ强制能效标签——空调器与热泵（哥伦比亚星级评定）
requirement_topic.zht: RETIQ強制能效標籤——空調器與熱泵（哥倫比亞星級評定）

summary.en: Colombia's Reglamento Técnico de Etiquetado (RETIQ), administered by the Ministry of Mines and Energy and enforced by SIC, mandates an energy efficiency label for air conditioners and heat-pump appliances sold in Colombia. The label uses a Colombian star rating system (1 to 5 stars) reflecting the product's energy efficiency ratio (EER or COP) compared to Colombian minimum efficiency thresholds. RETIQ compliance requires that efficiency testing be conducted at 60 Hz matching Colombian grid conditions, and that the label be affixed to the product and included in advertising and documentation. Products that do not meet the minimum efficiency standard may be prohibited from sale.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚《能效标签技术规程》（RETIQ）由矿业和能源部主管、SIC执行，要求在哥伦比亚销售的空调器和热泵电器张贴能效标签。标签采用哥伦比亚星级评定系统（1至5星），反映产品的能效比（EER或COP）相较于哥伦比亚最低能效门槛的水平。RETIQ合规要求在60 Hz（符合哥伦比亚电网条件）下进行能效测试，且标签须粘贴于产品上并纳入广告和文件。不符合最低能效标准的产品可能被禁止销售。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞《能效標籤技術規程》（RETIQ）由礦業和能源部主管、SIC執行，要求在哥倫比亞銷售的空調器和熱泵電器張貼能效標籤。標籤採用哥倫比亞星級評定系統（1至5星），反映產品的能效比（EER或COP）相較於哥倫比亞最低能效門檻的水平。RETIQ合規要求在60 Hz（符合哥倫比亞電網條件）下進行能效測試，且標籤須黏貼於產品上並納入廣告和文件。不符合最低能效標準的產品可能被禁止銷售。

standards_or_laws: RETIQ — Reglamento Técnico de Etiquetado (Colombia, Ministry of Mines and Energy)
SIC enforcement — Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio
UPME — Unidad de Planeación Minero Energética (efficiency threshold policy)

summary.en: China's mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) scheme, administered by CNCA and NEA, requires energy efficiency labels on room air conditioners under GB 12021.3, using a 1-to-5 grade scale. Chinese energy efficiency testing is performed at 50 Hz and uses Chinese EER/SEER thresholds under GB/T 7725 and GB 21455. The Chinese CEL label and 50 Hz test data are not transferable to Colombia's RETIQ star rating system, which requires 60 Hz testing and applies different efficiency thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国强制性中国能效标识（CEL）制度由CNCA和国家能源局主管，要求房间空调器依据GB 12021.3张贴能效标识，采用1至5级评定。中国能效测试在50 Hz下进行，采用GB/T 7725和GB 21455下的中国EER/SEER门槛值。中国CEL标识和50 Hz测试数据不能转用于哥伦比亚RETIQ星级系统，后者要求60 Hz测试并适用不同的能效门槛。
summary.zht: 中國強制性中國能效標識（CEL）制度由CNCA和國家能源局主管，要求房間空調器依據GB 12021.3張貼能效標識，採用1至5級評定。中國能效測試在50 Hz下進行，採用GB/T 7725和GB 21455下的中國EER/SEER門檻值。中國CEL標識和50 Hz測試數據不能轉用於哥倫比亞RETIQ星級系統，後者要求60 Hz測試並適用不同的能效門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.3 (Energy efficiency labelling for room air conditioners)
GB 21455 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners)
GB 25454 (Heat pump water heaters — energy efficiency)

gap.en: Significant gap. China's CEL label and 50 Hz efficiency test data do not satisfy Colombia's RETIQ requirements. Colombian RETIQ star ratings require re-testing at 60 Hz under RETIQ test conditions and comparison against Colombian efficiency thresholds. Products must carry the Colombian star label (not the Chinese CEL label) on the unit and in advertising. Products failing minimum RETIQ thresholds cannot be sold in Colombia.
gap.zh: 存在重大差距。中国CEL标识和50 Hz能效测试数据不满足哥伦比亚RETIQ要求。哥伦比亚RETIQ星级评定须在RETIQ测试条件下以60 Hz重新测试，并与哥伦比亚能效门槛对比。产品须在设备上及广告中张贴哥伦比亚星级标签（而非中国CEL标识）。不达RETIQ最低门槛的产品不得在哥伦比亚销售。
gap.zht: 存在重大差距。中國CEL標識和50 Hz能效測試數據不滿足哥倫比亞RETIQ要求。哥倫比亞RETIQ星級評定須在RETIQ測試條件下以60 Hz重新測試，並與哥倫比亞能效門檻對比。產品須在設備上及廣告中張貼哥倫比亞星級標籤（而非中國CEL標識）。不達RETIQ最低門檻的產品不得在哥倫比亞銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RETIQ energy label required for air conditioners and heat pumps sold in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic Chinese market under CEL (GB 12021.3); not recognised in Colombia

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energía, República de Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — RETIQ Colombian star-rating label is mandatory; Chinese CEL label and 50 Hz test data are not transferable; re-testing at 60 Hz under RETIQ conditions required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——RETIQ哥伦比亚星级标签为强制要求；中国CEL标识和50 Hz测试数据不可转用；须在RETIQ条件下以60 Hz重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——RETIQ哥倫比亞星級標籤為強制要求；中國CEL標識和50 Hz測試數據不可轉用；須在RETIQ條件下以60 Hz重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: UPME PROURE Energy Efficiency Programme — Minimum Efficiency Standards and Market Surveillance
requirement_topic.zh: UPME PROURE能效计划——最低能效标准与市场监管
requirement_topic.zht: UPME PROURE能效計畫——最低能效標準與市場監管

summary.en: Colombia's Programa de Uso Racional y Eficiente de la Energía y demás formas de Energía no Convencionales (PROURE), coordinated by UPME (Unidad de Planeación Minero Energética) under Law 697 of 2001, sets minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and policy targets for heat pumps and air conditioners. PROURE targets drive the minimum efficiency thresholds embedded in RETIQ and inform ICONTEC NTC adoption. Products imported into Colombia must satisfy MEPS at the time of import; CREG and SIC coordinate grid and surveillance obligations. UPME publishes updated efficiency targets and sectoral energy efficiency goals that importers must monitor.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚《合理高效利用能源和其他非常规能源计划》（PROURE）由UPME（矿业能源规划局）依据2001年第697号法律协调，为热泵和空调器制定最低能效标准（MEPS）和政策目标。PROURE目标推动RETIQ中嵌入的最低能效门槛，并指导ICONTEC NTC的采纳。进口至哥伦比亚的产品须在进口时满足MEPS；CREG和SIC协调电网和监管义务。UPME发布更新的能效目标和行业能效目标，进口商须持续关注。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞《合理高效利用能源和其他非常規能源計畫》（PROURE）由UPME（礦業能源規劃局）依據2001年第697號法律協調，為熱泵和空調器制定最低能效標準（MEPS）和政策目標。PROURE目標推動RETIQ中嵌入的最低能效門檻，並指導ICONTEC NTC的採納。進口至哥倫比亞的產品須在進口時滿足MEPS；CREG和SIC協調電網和監管義務。UPME發布更新的能效目標和行業能效目標，進口商須持續關注。

standards_or_laws: Ley 697 de 2001 — Uso Racional y Eficiente de la Energía (Colombia)
PROURE — Programa de Uso Racional y Eficiente de la Energía (UPME)
RETIQ MEPS thresholds for air conditioners and heat pumps
CREG — Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas (grid/energy regulation)

summary.en: China's GB 21455 sets minimum allowable energy efficiency values and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners. China's MEPS are administered by CNCA and enforced through the CEL regime. Chinese MEPS thresholds and the COP/SEER values in GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 apply to 50 Hz, 220 V Chinese grid conditions and are not directly comparable to Colombian PROURE/RETIQ MEPS values measured at 60 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国GB 21455规定房间空调器的最低允许能效值和能效等级，中国MEPS由CNCA主管并通过CEL制度执行。GB 25454和GB/T 7725中的中国MEPS门槛及COP/SEER值适用于50 Hz、220 V中国电网条件，不能直接与在60 Hz下测量的哥伦比亚PROURE/RETIQ MEPS值进行比较。
summary.zht: 中國GB 21455規定房間空調器的最低允許能效值和能效等級，中國MEPS由CNCA主管並透過CEL制度執行。GB 25454和GB/T 7725中的中國MEPS門檻及COP/SEER值適用於50 Hz、220 V中國電網條件，不能直接與在60 Hz下量測的哥倫比亞PROURE/RETIQ MEPS值進行比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners)
GB 25454 (Heat pump water heaters — energy efficiency)
GB/T 7725 (Room air conditioners — performance testing at 50 Hz)
China CEL (China Energy Label) regime — CNCA / NEA

gap.en: Moderate gap requiring monitoring. PROURE MEPS thresholds are measured at 60 Hz and may differ from Chinese GB MEPS values. Chinese exporters must verify that their product's efficiency at 60 Hz meets current RETIQ MEPS and monitor UPME updates to PROURE targets, which may tighten over time. Products that meet Chinese MEPS at 50 Hz but underperform at 60 Hz due to compressor design may fail Colombian MEPS without hardware modification.
gap.zh: 存在需持续关注的中等差距。PROURE MEPS门槛在60 Hz下测量，可能与中国GB MEPS值不同。中国出口商须核验其产品在60 Hz下的能效是否符合现行RETIQ MEPS，并持续关注UPME对PROURE目标的更新（目标可能随时间收紧）。满足中国50 Hz MEPS但因压缩机设计在60 Hz下性能下降的产品，若不进行硬件改造，可能无法通过哥伦比亚MEPS。
gap.zht: 存在需持續關注的中等差距。PROURE MEPS門檻在60 Hz下量測，可能與中國GB MEPS值不同。中國出口商須核驗其產品在60 Hz下的能效是否符合現行RETIQ MEPS，並持續關注UPME對PROURE目標的更新（目標可能隨時間收緊）。滿足中國50 Hz MEPS但因壓縮機設計在60 Hz下性能下降的產品，若不進行硬體改造，可能無法通過哥倫比亞MEPS。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PROURE MEPS embedded in RETIQ; products not meeting thresholds prohibited from Colombian market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic Chinese market under GB 21455 / CEL; 50 Hz test basis not equivalent to Colombian 60 Hz MEPS

source.publisher: UPME — Unidad de Planeación Minero Energética, República de Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moderate gap — PROURE MEPS must be verified at 60 Hz; Chinese 50 Hz efficiency data cannot be directly mapped to Colombian thresholds; efficiency may degrade at 60 Hz requiring hardware redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在中等差距——须在60 Hz下核验PROURE MEPS；中国50 Hz能效数据不能直接映射至哥伦比亚门槛；60 Hz下能效可能下降，须进行硬件重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在中等差距——須在60 Hz下核驗PROURE MEPS；中國50 Hz能效數據不能直接對應至哥倫比亞門檻；60 Hz下能效可能下降，須進行硬體重新設計。
